movie.synopsis: In a coastal village, gold dealer Ajesh lends 25 sovereigns to Bruno for his sister Steffy’s wedding. Chaos ensues when Steffy marries criminal Mariano, who hoards the gold and tries to eliminate Ajesh. Can Ajesh outsmart Mariyano?
